options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Thank you for your message. I look forward to connecting with you when you return to Chicago. Please feel free to reach out at that time, and we can discuss further. Best regards.

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Oh nice! Can't wait to hear from you when you're back in Chicago! We should definitely catch up then. Talk soon! 🙌

options.subject: Re: When I am back in chicgaooooooo
options.body: Sounds good! Hit me up when you're back in Chicago.
